heroSubtitle: Download, complete, and bring patient forms to your appointment, or fill them out online before your visit.
beforeAppointmentBody1: To expedite your check-in and ensure we have complete information about your medical history, please complete the appropriate patient forms before your appointment.
beforeAppointmentBody2: You can either download and print the forms to bring with you, or fill them out online through our patient portal. If you need assistance completing any forms, please call us at (303) 951-0600.

formCategories.title: Patient Forms & Documents
formCategories.description: Downloadable forms for new and established patients.

forms.title: Release of Information
forms.description: Authorization for release of medical records to other providers or parties.

forms.title: Sleep Diary
forms.description: Track your sleep patterns before your sleep medicine appointment.

forms.title: Notice of Privacy Practices
forms.description: HIPAA privacy notice and patient rights information.

onlineServices.title: Fill Out Online
onlineServices.description: New patient paperwork — complete the Pulmonary & Sleep Packet online before your visit.

onlineServices.title: Patient Portal / Epic MyChart
onlineServices.description: Access your medical records, test results, view medications, and communicate with your care team.

onlineServices.title: Online Scheduling
onlineServices.description: Schedule or reschedule your appointments at your convenience, 24/7 (for established patients only).

onlineServices.title: Online Bill Payment
onlineServices.description: Pay your medical bills securely online using our payment portal.

printingSteps: Click the Download button for the form you need
Print the PDF on standard 8.5" x 11" paper
Complete the form using black or blue ink
Bring the completed form to your appointment
onlineSteps: Log into your Patient Portal (Epic MyChart)
ctaBody: Complete your forms and book your appointment with one of our specialists.
